title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Garry Tan's approach to using Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days. The video extracts four strategies: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building.
